## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

What problem does this solve or what feature does it add?

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New miner driver
- [ ] New pool adapter
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / build

## Checklist

- [ ] `flutter analyze` passes with no warnings
- [ ] `flutter test` passes
- [ ] New code has tests
- [ ] README updated (if adding hardware or pool support)
- [ ] Screenshots attached (if UI change)

## Testing

Describe how you tested this change. Include miner model and firmware version if relevant.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots or recordings of the change.
